title: NearbyNode Capability Advertisement
description: Capability record advertised by a nearby device. Spec-only — NearbyNode is not implemented.

node_id.description: Stable device identity on the local network

capability_id.description: Stable capability identifier within the node

connector_type.description: How Local Brain invokes this capability (e.g. http_local, file_bridge)

requires_model.description: Whether this capability needs a model runtime on the node

input_schema.description: Path or URI to input JSON schema

output_schema.description: Path or URI to output JSON schema

track_affinity.description: Task tracks this capability can serve
